arts.ttl: Mainz vs Bayern München preview: Formidable visitors look to repeat Pokal antics
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern München aim to strengthen their grip on the top spot as they travel to Mewa Arena on Saturday to face Mainz in their 14th league match of the 2024-25 season

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich demolish Juventus in 4-0 Women’s Champions League showcase
arts.sum: Finally in the 81st, a well-worked team goal saw Sydney Lohmann feed Lea Schüller, who flicked back into space behind her. Klara Bühl conjured up a 22nd minute superb shot from range that found only the crossbar, but rebounded into the danger zone where Pernille Harder and then Jovana Damnjanović scrambled for seconds.

arts.ttl: Report: No decision on deadline for Alphonso Davies, but things are looking good for Bayern Munich to get deal done
arts.sum: Bayern and Alphonso Davies’ agents have been in regular contact in recent months, including via a video call last week. Things have certainly take a turn for the better in recent weeks between Davies and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Liverpool “serious” about Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané; Manchester City’s Kevin De Bruyne to MLS?; Manchester United to keep Matthijs de Ligt, Noussair Mazraoui; Inter Milan eyeing Liverpool’s Federico Chiesa; and MORE!
arts.sum: At this point, it has been reported that Sané is willing to take a pay cut to stay in Bavaria, but Bayern Munich might want to finally refresh the wing position and try some new players. Bayern Munich will travel to Mainz 05 for a Bundesliga tilt where head coach Vincent Kompany will have to continue to work through the mini-injury crisis that is going on at the moment.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool enter race to sign Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: Liverpool join Real Madrid and Manchester United in the chase for Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies while Benfica's Álvaro Carreras is another player attracting interest from around Europe. - Left-back Álvaro Carreras has been in sensational form for Benfica and his displays have alerted several clubs, namely former club Manchester United, as well as Barcelona, reports Sport .

arts.ttl: Zlatan Ibrahimović thinks Bayern Munich couldn’t have afforded him
arts.sum: Playing for a club like Bayern Munich would certainly not have been bad, just because of the club’s history and its players. Bayern Munich has seen some big names don their colors, but one player they never managed to get was Zlatan Ibrahimović, the Swedish legend known for his larger-than-life persona.

arts.ttl: Preview: Mainz 05 vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Mainz 05 and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich stars Dayot Upamecano, Leon Goretzka miss training; Hiroki Ito gets treatment; Harry Kane, Alphonso Davies, João Palhinha work out; and MORE!
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich center-back Dayot Upamecano and central midfielder Leon Goretzka missed training on Thursday: Harry Kane (training with the ball), Alphonso Davies (running training) and João Palhinha (rehab training without the ball) worked individually today [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/psk0xTTWRH

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 22: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany has been great, but he needs to rotate; Did Joshua Kimmich win the contract war?; Alphonso Davies staying?; Leroy Sané in jeopardy?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s first half (for all intents and purposes) is almost over and while the team is wrapping things up on the pitch, there is a lot of work being done in the boardroom. Did Joshua Kimmich win the negotiation war with Bayern Munich?

arts.ttl: Fabian Hürzeler says he will only leave Brighton for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Hürzeler did a Julian Nagelsmann in the sense that he has a connection with the Rekordmeister (Fabian was a Bayern player from 2004 to 2013 and played for 1860 Munich, Julian was a lifelong fan of the club and played for 1860) and is the youngest manager in the league at the time of their appointment. Brighton manager Fabian Hürzeler on which club he would leave Brighton for one day: I’m not going to make a secret of it - There’s of course a club close to my heart because I played there for ten or eleven years – and that’s FC Bayern.
